en.name: Level 8 — Cave Systems
en.shortDescription: A sprawling non-Euclidean cave network with treacherous terrain, wild temperature and gravity swings, and thin air.
en.atmosphere: Dark claustrophobic chambers of chaotic rock, cold stagnant air, distant creature sounds and constant risk of disorientation.
en.tips: Stay on the M.E.G.-marked 9th Road. Keep moving against hypothermia, watch oxygen, avoid spider colonies and floating rocks.
